releaseNotes: 完善 Codex、WorkBuddy 与豆包三端皮肤适配：覆盖对话背景、选中区块、模型和权限菜单、输入及发送/停止控件；移除文字周围多余底框，修复豆包黑色遮罩与浅色背景文字不可读问题，并同步更新 Skin Abstract 制作规范。
releaseNotesEn: Completes the Codex, WorkBuddy, and Doubao skin surfaces for conversation backgrounds, selected regions, model and permission menus, composer controls, and send/stop states. Removes per-text backing boxes, fixes Doubao black overlays and light-background contrast, and updates the Skin Abstract authoring rules.
